violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC is a Food Safety Manager, PIC must register with RIDOH as previous license expired. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment shut down ice machine to drain during time of inspection. Ice was disposed of. Establishment is to send photos to RIDOH of cleaned and sanitized ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/11/2026

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the kitchen area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the floor under draft machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The floor behind the bar area in the men's restroom is poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
